---
name: Agent Persona Idea
about: Propose a new built-in generic agent persona or system prompt
title: "[PERSONA] "
labels: "persona"
assignees: ""
---

**Persona Name**
e.g., Code Reviewer, Security Auditor

**System Prompt Overview**
Define the boundaries and instructions for the agent.

**Suggested Tools**
List the default tools this agent should have access to.

**Expected Use Cases**
When would a developer use this agent in the Swarm?
